frame_analyses.description: Initial setup with 6 objects on left pegs, instruments entering field
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean field setup, objects properly positioned on pegs

frame_analyses.description: Left (nondominant) grasper approaching first object on left peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper approach angle, good instrument control

frame_analyses.description: First object successfully grasped by left instrument, being transferred to right instrument
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean midair transfer, no dropping observed

frame_analyses.description: Right instrument placing first object on right peg
Left instrument picking up second object from left peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth continuation of task, good rhythm

frame_analyses.description: Multiple objects transferred, approximately 4 objects now on right pegs
Beginning reverse direction - right instrument picking up object from right peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper reversal of direction as required by protocol

frame_analyses.description: Object being transferred from right to left instrument in reverse direction
Left instrument placing object back on left peg during reverse phase
Task completion - all objects successfully transferred back to left pegs
frame_analyses.technique_notes: All 6 objects properly placed, task completed successfully

confidence_rationale: Clear visibility of all transfers and placements. All 6 objects clearly visible throughout task. No ambiguous drops or misplacements observed. Task completion clearly demonstrated.
technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with all 6 objects successfully transferred in both directions. No penalties incurred. Time of 183 seconds places performance in upper intermediate range.
strengths: Clean midair transfers with no drops
All objects successfully placed on pegs
improvement_suggestions: Reduce overall time from 183s toward expert range of 40-60s
Increase speed of individual transfers while maintaining precision
Practice faster instrument positioning and approach angles
